description: Dependency-graph-aware prompts derived from the March 2026 Improvement Spec. Covers grid bot safety net, lesson pipeline recovery, education platform hardening, orchestration upgrades, and infrastructure consolidation.

phases.description: CLAUDE.md governance, custom skills, hooks — no code dependencies

agents.name: claude-md-global
agents.description: Create ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md with global debugging protocol, intent confirmation, git workflow, and environment awareness rules

agents.name: claude-md-gridbot-v2
agents.description: Append trading-bot-specific rules to grid-bot-v2/CLAUDE.md (frozen state machine, fill detection paths, fee trace)

agents.name: claude-md-education
agents.description: Append rules to CLAUDE.md for lrsl-driller, curriculum_render, and apstats-live-worksheet

agents.name: custom-skills
agents.description: Create /push, /botfix, /analyze, /lessonprep, /cartridge skills in ~/.claude/skills/

agents.name: hooks-setup
agents.description: Add PostToolUse Python/JS lint hooks to ~/.claude/settings.json alongside existing GitNexus hooks

phases.description: Test-driven safety net for grid-bot-v2. Must complete before any production bug fixes.

agents.name: test-fill-detection-paths
agents.description: Write failing tests for every fill detection code path: normal poll, startup reconciliation, degraded mode, companion order placement

agents.name: test-startup-reconciliation
agents.description: Write tests for startup state reconstruction from ledger + adapter query, covering the missed initialization path that caused money loss

agents.name: test-orphan-recovery-paths
agents.description: Write tests for S1a/S1b orphan timeout → orphan order → recovery → re-bootstrap, including the bug where the wrong side was cancelled

agents.name: test-fee-integration
agents.description: Write end-to-end test tracing fee calculation from config.MAKER_FEE_PCT through cycle profit computation to ledger booking and dashboard display

agents.name: test-degraded-modes
agents.description: Write tests for all degraded mode transitions: S0_long_only, S0_short_only, S1a_short_only, S1b_long_only entry and exit

agents.name: ci-setup-gridbot
agents.description: Create GitHub Actions CI workflow for grid-bot-v2 that runs pytest on push/PR and reports coverage

contracts.name: conftest-fixtures-v1
contracts.description: Shared pytest fixtures for Kraken mock adapter, slot factory, and state builders

phases.description: Deep-link, progression, and grading hardening for education platform repos.

agents.name: test-deep-link-roundtrip
agents.description: Write Vitest tests for deep-link navigation, page refresh restoration, and progression gating after deep-link entry

agents.name: test-progression-regression
agents.description: Write Vitest tests for level completion → next level advancement, preventing the 5-7→5-2 regression

agents.name: extract-url-state-module
agents.description: Extract URL state management from app.html (3600 lines) into a dedicated platform/core/url-state.js module with tests

agents.name: test-grading-escalation-e2e
agents.description: Write integration tests for the full 3-tier grading escalation (keywords → AI → appeal) across both curriculum_render and lrsl-driller

phases.description: Recover dormant video transcription and harden lesson prep pipeline.

agents.name: whisper-integration
agents.description: Replace dormant Gemini transcription with Whisper (local whisper.cpp or OpenAI API) as drop-in replacement for video-ingest.mjs

agents.name: headless-executor
agents.description: Update Agent/runner/parallel-codex-runner.py to support --executor claude using Claude Code headless mode, fixing Windows TTY issues

agents.name: lessonprep-orchestrator-v3
agents.description: Rewrite lesson-prep.mjs to use dependency-aware step execution: transcript → rubric → worksheet → blooket, with parallel content generation where safe

agents.name: shared-grading-proxy
agents.description: Extract shared AI grading proxy from curriculum_render and lrsl-driller into standalone Express service with keyword + Groq + appeal escalation

agents.name: wire-grading-proxy-cr
agents.description: Update curriculum_render to call shared grading proxy instead of its own inline grading logic

agents.name: wire-grading-proxy-driller
agents.description: Update lrsl-driller to call shared grading proxy instead of its own inline grading logic

agents.name: supabase-consolidation
agents.description: Namespace Supabase tables for both education apps into a shared instance with unified auth

contracts.name: grading-api-v1
contracts.description: Shared grading proxy API contract — all consumers must use this interface

dependency_graph_summary.description: Visual dependency graph across all phases
graph: P1 (all 5 agents) ── no inter-dependencies, fully parallel
P5-01 shared-grading-proxy ──┬── P5-02 wire-cr ────┬── P5-04 supabase

notes: Phase 1 is zero-risk (config files only) — execute first to establish guardrails.
Phase 2 can run fully parallel except P2-04 (needs conftest from P2-01) and P2-06 (fan-in).
Phase 3 can start before Phase 2 completes (different repos, no shared files).
Phase 4 can start after Phase 1 (needs CLAUDE.md rules for lesson prep).
Phase 5 should run last — it touches production infrastructure.
